display.purpose: Homepage hero headline only. Appears once per session view. Never inside the authenticated product flow.

headline.purpose: Auth card heading — gateway moments only. Signals entry, not navigation.

title.purpose: Page-level headings inside the app: profile name, session page h1, section titles.

body.purpose: All primary reading content. 65–75ch max in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Badge text, form labels, metadata, bottom nav labels, card micro-copy.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Lightest separation layer. Available for persistent floating surfaces.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Applied on card :hover. Tinted toward Deep Ink Blue.

shadows.name: gateway
shadows.purpose: Auth card only. The one surface that is always fully elevated.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (colour, shadow, border).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: hover colour shifts, active states.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Card hover lift, button hover, chip fill transitions.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout; bottom nav replaces top nav as primary.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Skills grid switches from 1-col to auto-fill minmax(340px).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Sign in, save changes, send message. Never for destructive or exchange-specific actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #1F4E79; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #163a5c; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(31,78,121,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(46,117,182,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Exchange-positive actions only: offering to teach, confirming an exchange. The Reciprocity Rule applies.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #00C9A7; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #00e6bf; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(0,201,167,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA alongside a primary button. Cancel, view profile, secondary navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: transparent; color: #1F4E79; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid #1F4E79; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1F4E79; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(31,78,121,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chips
components.description: Category filter row on Home and Discover pages. One active chip at a time.
components.css: .ds-chips { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-chip { padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a2e; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #2E75B6; } .ds-chip--active { background: #1F4E79; color: #ffffff; border-color: #1F4E79; }

components.name: Skill Card
components.description: Primary content unit. Provider avatar, name, city, skill title, description excerpt, category and level badges, star rating.
components.html:
A
Asel Nurlanovna
Almaty, Kazakhstan
Python for Data Analysis
Hands-on sessions covering pandas, NumPy, and data visualisation. Ideal for beginners with some coding background.
ProgrammingIntermediate
4.8
components.css: .ds-skill-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .ds-skill-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(31,78,121,0.12); border-color: transparent; } .ds-skill-card__header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-skill-card__avatar { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1F4E79; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-skill-card__name { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #1a1a2e; } .ds-skill-card__city { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #6b7280; } .ds-skill-card__title { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #163a5c; } .ds-skill-card__desc { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.5; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-skill-card__footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-skill-card__rating { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: #f59e0b; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-badge--category { background: rgba(31,78,121,0.08); color: #1F4E79; } .ds-badge--level { background: rgba(0,201,167,0.10); color: #059669; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Used in login, registration, profile editing, skill creation.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #1a1a2e; display: block; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #1a1a2e; background: #ffffff; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2E75B6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46,117,182,0.1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; }

components.name: Search Bar
components.description: Full-pill search input on Home and Discover pages. The only pill-shaped input — its shape signals search distinctly from form fields.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 50px; padding: 8px 20px; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; max-width: 600px; } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: #2E75B6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46,117,182,0.1); } .ds-search__input { border: none; outline: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #1a1a2e; flex: 1; background: transparent; min-width: 0; } .ds-search__input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-search__btn { padding: 6px 14px; background: #1F4E79; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-search__btn:hover { background: #163a5c; }

components.name: Session Status Badges
components.description: Four session lifecycle states. Colour-coded; each state has its own tint from the semantic palette.
components.css: .ds-status-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-status--confirmed { background: #d1fae5; color: #047857; } .ds-status--requested { background: #fef3c7; color: #b45309; } .ds-status--completed { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; } .ds-status--cancelled { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Bottom Nav (Mobile)
components.description: Primary wayfinding surface on mobile. Fixed bottom, 5 items, icon-and-label. This is where most users navigate.
components.html: HomeDiscoverSessionsMessagesProfile
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; padding: 8px 0; background: #ffffff; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; width: 100%; } .ds-bottom-nav__item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; text-decoration: none; color: #6b7280; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-bottom-nav__item--active { color: #1F4E79; } .ds-bottom-nav__item:hover { color: #1F4E79; }

narrative.overview:
SkillSwap should feel like a physical bulletin board that someone who genuinely cared — not a committee, not a growth team — put up in a university corridor. Posts are written by real people for real people. The board's material shows through; there is warmth in its organisation, and clarity in its layout. A student scans it between classes; they are not sold to.

The system is restrained by principle, not by accident. Deep Ink Blue anchors navigation, headings, and primary actions. Reciprocity Green appears at exchange-positive moments only. Everything else steps back. The near-white background, quiet grey borders, and readable DM Sans body text exist to make the content — real people and real skills — the loudest thing on screen.

This system explicitly rejects the Fiverr / Upwork energy of transactional exchanges, hustle-culture urgency, and ranked-provider leaderboards. SkillSwap is a peer meeting a peer; the design must feel like that at every touchpoint.
keyCharacteristics: Light-mode surface; daylight reading context; no dark variant
Restrained colour palette: one primary, one reserved accent, near-white canvas
Serif display type (Playfair Display) at gateway and hero entry points only; DM Sans governs the product flow
Structural shadow: surfaces flat at rest, elevated on interaction or float
Mobile-first navigation; bottom nav is the primary wayfinding surface
Warm without being twee; functional without being cold

rules.name: The Reciprocity Rule
rules.body: Reciprocity Green (#00C9A7) is reserved for exchange-positive contexts: skill-offered badges, confirmed session status, accent CTAs on exchange-initiating actions. Every appearance of this colour should mean 'something good is available for you.'

rules.name: The One Primary Rule
rules.body: Deep Ink Blue carries all primary interactive weight. Do not introduce a third accent hue. If an element needs emphasis, reach for Deep Ink Blue tints or typographic weight.

rules.name: The Serif Gateway Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display appears only at the homepage hero and the auth card heading. Inside the authenticated product, DM Sans governs everything.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Category and level enum values are stored as uppercase strings. In display, they must be sentence-cased: 'Programming' not 'PROGRAMMING', 'Beginner' not 'BEGINNER'.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, list items, and containers sit on the same plane as the page at rest. Shadow is a response to state (hover, focus, float) — never a decorative background texture.

rules.name: The Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Deep shadows use rgba(31,78,121,...) tinted toward Deep Ink Blue rather than pure black rgba(0,0,0,...). This keeps depth inside the palette.

rules.name: The Modal-as-Last-Resort Rule
rules.body: Modals are currently used for 'Add skill' — acceptable since the form is genuinely modal. Don't expand modal use to confirmations, filters, or any flow that could be done inline or as a full page on mobile.

dos: Do use Reciprocity Green (#00C9A7) exclusively for exchange-positive moments: skill-offered indicators, confirmed session badges, accent CTAs on exchange-initiating actions.
Do keep card surfaces flat at rest. The 1px border is sufficient separation. Shadow is earned on hover.
Do use Playfair Display only at the homepage hero and the auth card heading. DM Sans governs everything inside the authenticated product.
Do sentence-case all enum values in display: 'Programming' not 'PROGRAMMING', 'Beginner' not 'BEGINNER'.
Do tint deep shadows toward Deep Ink Blue (rgba(31,78,121,...)) rather than pure black.
Do use the pill radius (50px) only for the search bar and filter chips. Cards: 12px. Buttons and inputs: 8px. Avatars: 50%.
Do cap body text at 65–75ch in reading contexts (bio, skill description, message bubbles).
Do use the CSS custom property system (var(--primary), var(--radius), etc.) for all components, not raw Tailwind colour classes.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: wrap transition and transform declarations accordingly.
donts: Don't use Fiverr / Upwork patterns: no 'hire now' CTAs, no provider tier badges, no ranking leaderboards, no transaction-framing language.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use a single solid colour.
Don't replicate the auth page gradient inside the product. It belongs to the gateway surface only.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The navbar backdrop-filter is functional — don't extend it to cards or modals.
Don't introduce a third accent colour. Deep Ink Blue + Reciprocity Green is the palette.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't render nested cards. Skill items inside the profile skills card are correctly rendered as list items — don't promote them to cards.
Don't build a dark mode. The Community Bulletin Board metaphor is a daytime surface.
Don't use raw Tailwind colour classes on new components. They bypass the token system and create a second source of truth.
